verdicts.description: Place the extruder body on a flat surface with the front face pointing upward.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker places extruder body on flat surface with front face visibly pointing upward.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker clearly places the extruder body on the workbench with correct orientation visible at 00:00:12.

verdicts.description: Insert the Bondtech drive gear onto the motor shaft, ensuring the set screw aligns with the flat side of the shaft.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker inserts Bondtech drive gear fully onto motor shaft with set screw aligned to the flat face.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker inserts the drive gear but set screw is visibly misaligned — rotated approximately 90 degrees from the flat face of the shaft.

verdicts.description: Tighten the set screw on the Bondtech drive gear using a 1.5mm hex key.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker tightens set screw with a 1.5mm hex key until resistance is felt.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker uses correct hex key and applies appropriate tightening action visible at 00:01:10.

verdicts.description: Apply a small amount of lubricant to the lead screw threads.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker applies a visible amount of lubricant to the lead screw threads.
verdicts.reasoning: Step is skipped entirely. Worker proceeds directly from step 3 to step 5 without applying any lubricant to the lead screw.

verdicts.description: Allow the lubricant to settle on the lead screw for at least 60 seconds.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker pauses all activity for a minimum of 60 seconds after lubricant application.
verdicts.reasoning: Lubricant was not applied (see STEP-004), and worker resumed activity after only 8 seconds. Duration constraint not met.

verdicts.description: Thread the lead screw into the brass nut on the X-axis carriage from the bottom, rotating clockwise.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker threads lead screw clockwise into the brass nut from below.
verdicts.reasoning: Camera angle does not allow visibility of the underside of the X-axis carriage. Threading direction cannot be confirmed.

verdicts.description: Mount the stepper motor to the extruder body using four M3x10 screws, tightening in a cross pattern.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker mounts stepper motor with four screws tightened in a cross pattern.
verdicts.reasoning: All four screws installed and cross-pattern tightening sequence confirmed from overhead camera at 00:03:00.

verdicts.description: Install the protective cap over the motor connector, pressing firmly until it clicks into place.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker presses protective cap onto motor connector until click confirms seating.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker installs protective cap with firm press. Cap seating confirmed visually at 00:03:12.
